landing.helperLine: host in the app · others scan the QR · works over the internet

host.title: Host a Party
host.errAndroidOnly: Install the Android app to host a party

intensity.mildHint: Warm-up vibes. Safe for any crowd.

join.title: Join a Party
join.adultConfirm: I confirm I am 18 or older and understand this room may contain adult content.
join.teenHint: 🌿 Teen accounts can only join party-safe rooms.
join.errMustConfirm: You must confirm you're 18 or older

liability.title: Host responsibility
liability.intro: You're about to host a {tier} tier session. By starting this party you confirm that:
liability.bullet1: Every player in the room is 18 or older.
liability.bullet2: All players have consented to adult content in this session.
liability.bullet3: You take responsibility for who you invite and what happens during play.

profile.title: Your account
profile.displayNameHint: Shown to other players in your rooms.
profile.previewAsTeenHint: See the app the way an under-18 player sees it (adult games hidden, Mild only). UI only — your real account is unchanged.
profile.deleteDesc: Deletes your account, profile, and any rooms you're hosting. Rooms you've joined as a guest stay intact.
profile.deleteConfirm: Type delete to confirm. This is permanent.

auth.verifyBody: We sent a link to {email}. Click it to activate your account.
auth.resetBody: Enter your email and we'll send a reset link.
auth.resetSent: Check your inbox for the reset link.

room.shareText: Join my Party Mate session — code {code}
room.hostOnlyIntensity: Only the host changes the intensity.
room.adultTierDesc: This party is set to {tier}. Before continuing, please confirm:
room.consentBullet2: You consent to explicit adult content during this session.
room.consentBullet3: You can leave or swap to a milder tier at any time.
room.waitingHost: Waiting for host to pick a game…
room.consentBody: Tap below to confirm you're in and happy to play this session.

share.title: Share this room
share.copyToast: Copied — paste it in {app} to send

download.title: Get the App
download.subtitle: One tap install · works offline once loaded · no account needed to join
download.step1Body: Your browser downloads the APK. If a warning asks 'Keep anyway?' — tap Keep.
download.step2Body: Pull down your notification shade and tap the download, or open your Files app and find the APK.
download.step3Body: Android blocks non-Play-Store installs by default. On the popup: Settings → toggle 'Allow from this source' ON → back.
download.step4Body: Tap Install. When it says 'App installed', tap Open.
download.releasesHint: Don't see a download button? Check our GitHub Releases page.
download.iosIntro: iOS doesn't allow APKs. Use the web app — it works just like a native app when added to your home screen.
download.iosStep2Body: The square with an up-arrow, at the bottom-center of Safari.
download.iosStep3Body: Scroll the share sheet. Tap 'Add to Home Screen' → Add.
download.iosStep4Body: The icon opens the app fullscreen — no browser bars.
download.desktopBody: Desktop doesn't need an install — just host a room and let your friends scan the QR.
download.desktopHint: On Chrome / Edge, an Install icon in the address bar turns it into a desktop app window.
download.playStoreBody: Party Mate has adult content in the Chaos tier, and Google Play doesn't allow that. Sideloading the APK keeps the full game intact — no watered-down version.
